output.summary: Combines value-residual blending, DenseFormer depth-weighted averaging, and test-time tuning on scored validation windows to extend the 10-layer base stack.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Fine-tunes on already-scored validation tokens during sliding-window evaluation via AdamW test-time training.
techniques: Value-residual blending of first-layer V vectors
DenseFormer depth-weighted averaging over previous layers
AdamW test-time tuning on scored validation windows
